module_1_interaction_schema.summary: Customer interaction answers and state were captured.

module_2_requirement_clarification.summary: Email sorting boundary facts are available.

module_3_rpa_boundary_check.summary: Requirement is conditionally suitable because semantic classification needs review handling.

confirmed_facts.value: Automatically classify Outlook or Microsoft 365 emails into folders or labels.

inferred_recommendations.value: Keep low-confidence semantic classification results in a manual review queue.

missing_required_items.question: Are representative examples available for each email category?

conflict_or_uncertainty.description: Some messages rely on semantic judgment rather than fixed sender or subject rules.
conflict_or_uncertainty.impact: Unattended automation may misclassify emails without manual review.

decision_summary.headline: Email sorting is conditionally suitable with low-confidence manual review.

customer_view_model.headline: Email sorting can be automated with manual review for uncertain emails.
customer_view_model.recommendation: Confirm category examples and low-confidence handling.
customer_view_model.requirement_understanding: Classify incoming Outlook or Microsoft 365 emails by sender, subject, keywords, and semantic meaning.
business_scope_excluded: Fully unattended semantic judgment for every message

process_cards.title: Read email
process_cards.summary: Read sender, subject, and body signals.

risk_and_manual_intervention: Low-confidence semantic results need manual review.

confirmed_development_basis: Target mailbox and classification goal are confirmed.
rpa_capability_boundary: RPA can move or label emails.
RPA must not pretend uncertain semantic judgment is fully deterministic.

process_cards.title: Email signal reading
process_cards.summary: Read sender, subject, and body signals for classification.

field_and_data_mapping: Email signal to target category mapping requires examples.
exception_handling: Low-confidence semantic classification enters manual review.
acceptance_criteria: Low-confidence emails are not silently processed.
